local function v70()
	Instance.new('LocalScript', frame)
	require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Notification).new('<Color=Yellow>Auto Farm Chest Slimex Hub!<Color=/>'):Display()
	getgenv().Setting = {
		WhiteScreen = false,
		TimeReset = 4.5,
		ModFarm = {
			StopItemLegendary = true,
			SummonKillDarkbeard = true
		}
	}
	local localPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer
	if game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main:FindFirstChild('ChooseTeam') then
		while true do
			if true then
				wait()
				if getgenv().Setting.ModFarm.StopItemLegendary or getgenv().Setting.ModFarm.SummonKillDarkbeard then
					local v1, v2, v3 = pairs(getconnections(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.Main.ChooseTeam.Container.Pirates.Frame.TextButton.Activated))
					while true do
						local v4
						v3, v4 = v1(v2, v3)
						if v3 == nil then
							break
						end
						local v5, v6, v7 = pairs(getconnections(game:GetService('UserInputService').TouchTapInWorld))
						while true do
							local v8
							v7, v8 = v5(v6, v7)
							if v7 == nil then
								break
							end
							v8:Fire()
						end
						v4.Function()
					end
				else
					game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('SetTeam', 'Pirates')
				end
			end
			if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Team ~= nil and game:IsLoaded() then
				goto l3
			end
		end
	else
		::l3::
		wait(0.5)
		game:GetService('RunService'):Set3dRenderingEnabled(not getgenv().Setting.WhiteScreen)
		AutoFarmChest = true
		spawn(function()
			while task.wait() do
				if AutoFarmChest then
					local v9 = game.Workspace:FindFirstChild('Chest4') or (game.Workspace:FindFirstChild('Chest3') or game.Workspace:FindFirstChild('Chest2'))
					if v9 then
						game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:PivotTo(v9:GetPivot())
						firesignal(v9.Touched, game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart)
					else
						hopserver = true
						AutoFarmChest = false
					end
				end
			end
		end)
		spawn(function()
			while task.wait() do
				if AutoFarmChest and game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Head') then
					wait(getgenv().Setting.TimeReset)
					if (getgenv().Setting.ModFarm.StopItemLegendary or getgenv().Setting.ModFarm.SummonKillDarkbeard) and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Fist of Darkness') or (game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Fist of Darkness') or (game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:FindFirstChild('God\'s Chalice') or game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('God\'s Chalice'))) then
						AutoFarmChest = false
					else
						game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('SetTeam', 'Pirates')
					end
				end
			end
		end)
		spawn(function()
			while task.wait() do
				if hopserver then
					HopServer()
				end
			end
		end)
		function HopServer(p10)
			ticklon = tick()
			local u11 = p10 or 10
			repeat
				task.wait()
			until tick() - ticklon >= 1
			local function v18()
				for v12 = 1, math.huge do
					if ChooseRegion == nil or ChooseRegion == '' then
						ChooseRegion = 'Singapore'
					else
						game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.ServerBrowser.Frame.Filters.SearchRegion.TextBox.Text = ChooseRegion
					end
					local v13 = game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').__ServerBrowser:InvokeServer(v12)
					local v14, v15, v16 = pairs(v13)
					while true do
						local v17
						v16, v17 = v14(v15, v16)
						if v16 == nil then
							break
						end
						if v16 ~= game.JobId and v17.Count < u11 then
							game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').__ServerBrowser:InvokeServer('teleport', v16)
						end
					end
				end
				return false
			end
			if not getgenv().Loaded then
				local v19, v20, v21 = pairs(game.CoreGui.RobloxPromptGui.promptOverlay:GetChildren())
				local function v23(p22)
					if p22.Name == 'ErrorPrompt' then
						if p22.Visible and p22.TitleFrame.ErrorTitle.Text == 'Teleport Failed' then
							HopServer()
							p22.Visible = false
						end
						p22:GetPropertyChangedSignal('Visible'):Connect(function()
							if p22.Visible and p22.TitleFrame.ErrorTitle.Text == 'Teleport Failed' then
								HopServer()
								p22.Visible = false
							end
						end)
					end
				end
				while true do
					local v24
					v21, v24 = v19(v20, v21)
					if v21 == nil then
						break
					end
					v23(v24)
				end
				game.CoreGui.RobloxPromptGui.promptOverlay.ChildAdded:Connect(v23)
				getgenv().Loaded = true
			end
			while not v18() do
				task.wait()
			end
		end
		game:GetService('CoreGui').RobloxPromptGui.promptOverlay.ChildAdded:Connect(function(p25)
			if not hopserver and (p25.Name == 'ErrorPrompt' and p25:FindFirstChild('MessageArea')) and p25.MessageArea:FindFirstChild('ErrorFrame') then
				game:GetService('TeleportService'):Teleport(game.PlaceId)
			end
		end)
		local u26 = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Util.CameraShaker)
		CombatFrameworkR = require(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts.CombatFramework)
		y = debug.getupvalues(CombatFrameworkR)[2]
		spawn(function()
			game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Connect(function()
				if FastAttack and typeof(y) == 'table' then
					pcall(function()
						u26:Stop()
						y.activeController.timeToNextAttack = 0
						y.activeController.hitboxMagnitude = 60
						y.activeController.active = false
						y.activeController.timeToNextBlock = 0
						y.activeController.focusStart = 1655503339.0980349
						y.activeController.increment = 1
						y.activeController.blocking = false
						y.activeController.attacking = false
						y.activeController.humanoid.AutoRotate = true
					end)
				end
			end)
		end)
		spawn(function()
			game:GetService('RunService').RenderStepped:Connect(function()
				if FastAttack and game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Stun') then
					game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Stun.Value = 0
					game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Sit = false
					game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Busy.Value = false
				end
			end)
		end)
		local u27 = debug.getupvalues(require(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts:WaitForChild('CombatFramework')))[2]
		game:GetService('VirtualUser')
		local _ = debug.getupvalues(require(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts.CombatFramework.RigController))[2]
		local localPlayer2 = game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer
		require(localPlayer2.PlayerScripts.CombatFramework.Particle.Damage)
		require(game.ReplicatedStorage.Util.CameraShaker):Stop()
		function CurveFuckWeapon()
			local parent = u27.activeController.blades[1]
			if parent then
				while parent.Parent ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character do
					parent = parent.Parent
				end
				return parent
			end
		end
		function getHits(p28)
			local v29 = workspace.Enemies:GetChildren()
			local v30 = workspace.Characters:GetChildren()
			local v31 = {}
			for v32 = 1, #v29 do
				local v33 = v29[v32]:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid')
				if v33 then
					if v33.RootPart then
						if v33.Health > 0 then
							if game.Players.LocalPlayer:DistanceFromCharacter(v33.RootPart.Position) < p28 + 5 then
								table.insert(v31, v33.RootPart)
							end
						end
					end
				end
			end
			for v34 = 1, #v30 do
				local v35 = v30[v34]
				if v35 ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character then
					local v36 = v35:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid')
					if v36 then
						if v36.RootPart then
							if v36.Health > 0 then
								if game.Players.LocalPlayer:DistanceFromCharacter(v36.RootPart.Position) < p28 + 5 then
									table.insert(v31, v36.RootPart)
								end
							end
						end
					end
				end
			end
			return v31
		end
		Instance.new('Animation')
		abc = true
		task.spawn(function()
			local localPlayer3 = game.Players.LocalPlayer
			local u37 = require(localPlayer3.PlayerScripts.CombatFramework.Particle)
			local u38 = require(game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').CombatFramework.RigLib)
			if not shared.orl then
				shared.orl = u38.wrapAttackAnimationAsync
			end
			if not shared.cpc then
				shared.cpc = u37.play
			end
			if abc then
				pcall(function()
					function u38.wrapAttackAnimationAsync(p39, p40, p41, p42, p43)
						local v44 = u38.getBladeHits(p40, p41, p42)
						if v44 then
							function u37.play() end
							p39:Play(0.25, 0.25, 0.25)
							p43(v44)
							u37.play = shared.cpc
							wait(0.5)
							p39:Stop()
						end
					end
				end)
			end
		end)
		function AttackHit()
			local u45 = debug.getupvalues(require(game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.PlayerScripts.CombatFramework))[2]
			local localPlayer3 = game.Players.LocalPlayer
			for v46 = 1, 1 do
				local v47 = require(game.ReplicatedStorage.CombatFramework.RigLib).getBladeHits(localPlayer3.Character, { localPlayer3.Character.HumanoidRootPart }, 60)
				local v48, v49, v50 = pairs(v47)
				local v462 = v46
				local v51 = {}
				local u52 = {}
				while true do
					local v53
					v50, v53 = v48(v49, v50)
					if v50 == nil then
						break
					end
					if v53.Parent:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and not v51[v53.Parent] then
						table.insert(u52, v53.Parent.HumanoidRootPart)
						v51[v53.Parent] = true
					end
				end
				if #u52 > 0 then
					pcall(function()
						u45.activeController.timeToNextAttack = 1
						u45.activeController.attacking = false
						u45.activeController.blocking = false
						u45.activeController.timeToNextBlock = 0
						u45.activeController.increment = 3
						u45.activeController.hitboxMagnitude = 100
						u45.activeController.focusStart = 0
						game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').RigControllerEvent:FireServer('weaponChange', tostring(CurveFuckWeapon()))
						game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').RigControllerEvent:FireServer('hit', u52, v462, '')
					end)
				end
			end
		end
		function equip(p54)
			local localPlayer3 = game.Players.LocalPlayer
			local v55 = localPlayer3.Character or localPlayer3.CharacterAdded:wait()
			local v56, v57, v58 = pairs(localPlayer3.Backpack:GetChildren())
			while true do
				local v59
				v58, v59 = v56(v57, v58)
				if v58 == nil then
					break
				end
				if v59:IsA('Tool') and v59.ToolTip == p54 then
					local v60 = v55:FindFirstChildOfClass('Humanoid')
					if v60 and not v60:IsDescendantOf(v59) then
						game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:EquipTool(v59)
						return true
					end
				end
			end
			return false
		end
		function to(p61)
			pcall(function()
				if localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('HumanoidRootPart') and localPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('Humanoid').Health > 0 then
					Distance = (p61.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position).Magnitude
					if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.PrimaryPart:FindFirstChild('Hold') then
						local bodyVelocity = Instance.new('BodyVelocity', game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.PrimaryPart)
						bodyVelocity.Name = 'Hold'
						bodyVelocity.MaxForce = Vector3.new(math.huge, math.huge, math.huge)
						bodyVelocity.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0, 0)
					end
					if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Sit == true then
						game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Sit = false
					end
					if Distance >= 250 then
						if Distance >= 500 then
							if Distance >= 1000 then
								if Distance >= 1000 then
									Speed = 350
								end
							else
								Speed = 375
							end
						else
							Speed = 400
						end
					else
						localPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = p61
					end
					pcall(function()
						local v62 = {
							CFrame = p61
						}
						tween = game:GetService('TweenService'):Create(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, TweenInfo.new(Distance / Speed, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear), v62)
						tween:Play()
					end)
					game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = CFrame.new(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.X, p61.Y, game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame.Z)
				end
			end)
		end
		local u63 = 30
		local u64 = 0
		function getNextPosition(p65)
			u64 = u64 + 15
			return p65 + Vector3.new(math.sin(math.rad(u64)) * u63, 10, math.cos(math.rad(u64)) * u63)
		end
		spawn(function()
			while wait() do
				if getgenv().Setting.ModFarm.SummonKillDarkbeard and gotobegod then
					pcall(function()
						-- block 33
						local localPlayer3 = game.Player.LocalPlayer
						if localPlayer3.Backpack:FindFirstChild('Fist of Darkness') or localPlayer3.Character:FindFirstChild('Fist of Darkness') then
							AutoFarmChest = false
							equip('Fist of Darkness')
							to(CFrame.new(3777.58618, 14.8764334, -3498.81909, 0.13158533, 1.16175372e-8, -0.991304874, -9.53944035e-10, 1, 1.15928129e-8, 0.991304874, -5.79794768e-10, 0.13158533))
							goto l6
						end
						if not (game:GetService('Workspace').Enemies:FindFirstChild('Darkbeard') or game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage'):FindFirstChild('Darkbeard')) then
							::l6::
							return
						end
						local v66, v67, v68 = pairs(game.Workspace.Enemies:GetChildren())
						goto l11
						::l22::
						task.wait(0.1)
						if not game:GetService('Players').LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild('HasBuso') then
							game:GetService('ReplicatedStorage').Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer('Buso')
						end
						equip('Melee')
						v69.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false
						v69.Head.CanCollide = false
						v69.WalkSpeed = 0
						to(getNextPosition(v69.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame))
						game:GetService('VirtualUser'):CaptureController()
						game:GetService('VirtualUser'):Button1Down(Vector2.new(1280, 672))
						FastAttack = true
						AttackHit()
						local health = v69:FindFirstChild('Humanoid')
						if health then
							health = v69.Humanoid.Health
						end
						if health > 0 then
							goto l22
						end
						FastAttack = false
						AutoFarmChest = true
						::l11::
						while true do
							local v69
							v68, v69 = v66(v67, v68)
							if v68 == nil then
								goto l6
							end
							if v69 and (v69.Parent and (v69:FindFirstChild('Humanoid') and (v69.Humanoid.Health > 0 and v69.Name == 'Darkbeard'))) then
								goto l22
							end
						end
					end)
				end
			end
		end)
		return
	end
end
coroutine.wrap(v70)()
local function v71()
	Instance.new('LocalScript', textButton3).Parent.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		AutoFarmChest = false
	end)
end
coroutine.wrap(v71)()
local function v72()
	Instance.new('LocalScript', textButton4).Parent.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
		AutoFarmChest = true
	end)
end
coroutine.wrap(v72)()
local function v73()
	local localScript = Instance.new('LocalScript', frame)
	localScript.Parent.Active = true
	localScript.Parent.Draggable = true
end
coroutine.wrap(v73)()
